name: instagram-link-at-booking-tool-not-treated-as-booking
description: Dumb-user behavior: user pastes their Instagram link 'instagram.com/glowstudio' at SALON_BOOKING_TOOL thinking it's the same kind of 'paste your link' question. Instagram is NOT a booking tool — embedding it would make the booking page useless. Bot must either reject this politely (re-ask for booking-tool URL) or recognize the wrong-link mistake — but must NOT save it as bookingUrl/bookingMode='embed'. State stays SALON_BOOKING_TOOL, no booking mode set.
